text: For multi-step survey forms, add a final completion gate that re-validates ALL steps, not just the current one. Per-step navigation guards prevent most paths, but defense-in-depth at the 'complete' call site is essential. The provision should be a single named function (e.g. isEnergyCertificateReadyToComplete) so the list of required fields has one authoritative location.
issue: EC survey could set status='completed' even if user bypassed per-step validation or navigated backward
